title: Short title
doc_html:
§1183.  Short title

This Subpart may be known and cited as the "Long-Term Care Insurance Act".

Acts 1989, No. 448, §1, eff. Sept. 1, 1989; Redesignated from R.S. 22:1733 by Acts 2008, No. 415, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2009.

§1183.  Short title
This Subpart may be known and cited as the "Long-Term Care Insurance Act".
